name: Tux Typing
description: A fun educational game that teaches touch typing and keyboard skills. It features falling letters and words that users must type to progress.
tutorial_steps: Find the 'Tux Typing' icon on your EndlessOS app grid and open it.
Select 'Fish Cascade' from the main menu for a fun starting game.
Choose a difficulty level (like 'Easy') and start typing the letters as they fall into the water!

name: Tux Paint
description: A simple and creative drawing program for kids and beginners. It includes stamps, magic effects, and easy-to-use digital art tools.
tutorial_steps: Open 'Tux Paint' from the application menu on the other device.
Click the 'New' button on the left to start with a fresh canvas.
Select a 'Stamp' or a 'Brush' from the toolbar on the right and start drawing anywhere on the screen.

name: Tux of Math Command
description: An arcade-style math game that helps practice addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division by shooting down falling math asteroids.
tutorial_steps: Look for the 'Tux Math' penguin icon on EndlessOS and launch it.
Select 'Play Alone' and then choose 'Training Academy' to pick a specific math operation.
Solve the math problems shown on the falling asteroids and type the answer on your keyboard to zap them!

name: Physics
description: An interactive science learning app that helps learners explore physics topics like motion, force, energy, and simple experiments.
tutorial_steps: Find the 'Physics' app on the EndlessOS app grid and open it.
Choose a beginner topic such as motion, force, or energy from the main screen.
Open one lesson or activity and tap through the first example or experiment to start learning.

name: Biology
description: A life science app for exploring living things, including plants, animals, the human body, and nature topics through beginner-friendly lessons.
tutorial_steps: Open the 'Biology' app from the EndlessOS application menu.
Pick a simple topic like plants, animals, or the human body from the home screen.
Select the first lesson and read or tap through the opening section to begin.

name: Farming
description: An educational app about agriculture that introduces farming basics such as crops, soil, planting, harvesting, and food production.
tutorial_steps: Look for 'Farming' on the EndlessOS app grid and launch it.
Choose a starting section about crops, planting, or taking care of a farm.
Open the first activity or lesson and follow the introduction to learn how food is grown.

name: GeoGebra
description: A hands-on math app for exploring geometry, algebra, graphing, and measurement with interactive tools and visual diagrams.
tutorial_steps: Open 'GeoGebra' from the EndlessOS app menu.
Start a new graphing or geometry activity from the main workspace.
Use one tool like Point, Line, or Graph to place your first object on the screen.
